feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Signavio integration using Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please let us know if there are any standard adapters available to integrate SAP Signavio using Cloud Integration(Integration Suite).. or what all is needed from SAP Signavio side like API, or are there any standard APIs available to integrate SAP Signavio ingestions? Thank you!

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: how to read field with namespace error Undeclared namespace prefix
entry.content:
hello everyone,

i need to read the content of the "test" field with namespace via content modifier

this is the xml:

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Header>
    <wsse:Security soap:mustUnderstand="1" xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd"/>
  </soap:Header>
  <soap:Body>
    <n0:invoke xmlns="http://cxf.component.camel.apache.org/">
      <n0:test>string</n0:test>
    </n0:invoke>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

 

I entered the namespace in the "namespace mapping" section

 

 

 

 

 

 

i tried also this:

Content modifier:

 

after a test via Postman, I immediately get the following error:

Undeclared namespace prefix "n0"

 

 

how can i do it?
thank you

entry.title: Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance iflow-key
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to subscribe to delete a service key of Process Integration Runtime in my trial environment. I am getting the below error:

Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance <key-name>: Service broker error: Service broker it-broker-rt failed with: Internal Server Error
Does anybody have any idea on this?

entry.title: eDocument cockpit -> CPI -> ANAF response message error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We want to connect the eDocument to the Romanian tax authorities (ANAF) through the CPI middleware. Three calls are necessary for this, all this calls worked. In these calls, we receive the DownloadID, UploadID, and a ZIP file from ANAF in the third call.

We are unsure how to create the response for the eDocument. The edoccockpit does not return any errors:

So nothing is being processed and the transaction is still listed as "RED status" We are using this service consumer, and I suspect that the issue lies with the "EncodedZippedResponse" field. SOAMANAGER: CO_EDO_RO_E_DOCUMENT_RO

The ZIP file contains two files. My question is:

Should I convert the whole ZIP file to Base64 and send it back to the eDocument? Or should I unpack it first and  send only parts of the ZIP file? Does anyone have experience with this topic?

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Sequence Data API in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How Can we Fetch Sequence data via API from SuccessFactors.

I treid to check in Odata Api Data Dictionary and SAP Business Accelerator hub, but no luck.

Could you please help me identify the API.

Thankyou,

Anil

entry.title: How to use FILTER condition in HTTP Receiver Adapter for SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Techies, 

 

I would like to bring up here one interesting Topic in this blog, Which I have faced few issues while using the HTTP Receiver Adapter in SAP CPI.

I have faced issues with the OData Adapter that GET was not successful due to some Conversion of date with Exception. So decided to use HTTP Adapter instead of OData.

By using OData adapter its pretty simple that we can filter condition while configuring the fields in OData fields selection level and based on the selected fields and filters query will be generated automatically.

But Incase of HTTP Adapter we need to manually form the Query in Param1=Value1&Param2=Value2 like this. This format will work if I want to use only with field level Query.

I want to use Filter in the Query tab I have used below format
$filter=Material='1234' 

$filter=Materialeq'1234'  but no luck 😞

Finally after so many trail and error methods below format is working and its able to fetch only particular Materials.

$filter=Material%20eq%20'1234'

The formation of the query should be separated with %20 before and after eq

So, by using the above format we can the Filter condition in HTTP Receiver condition and also SKIP and TOP also will be accepted by HTTP Adapter Query level.

$filter=Material%20eq%20'1234'&$top=10&$skip=5

 

Thanks & Regards, 

SaiBandaru

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration

SAP S/4HANA SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration

entry.title: Encoding Conversion Groovy Script
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am now writing Groovy script for Encoding Conversion.

To be specific, a script for the conversion between Shift_JIS and UTF-8. 

I have completed the scripts that can do the one-way conversion from Shift_JIS to UTF-8, as well as the one-way conversion from UTF-8 to Shift_JIS.

However, when I want to write a two-way conversion script, it did not work well on Cloud Integration.

Could anyone kindly help me with this?

 

 

As your reference, here are the scripts that I wrote.

1)one-way conversion from Shift_JIS to UTF-8 (Worked Well)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body as a byte array to preserve the original encoding
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    
    // Convert the Shift_JIS byte array to a UTF-8 string
    def utf8String = new String(bodyBytes, "Shift_JIS").getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)
    
    // Set the converted UTF-8 byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(utf8String)
    
    // Set the output charset to UTF-8
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", "UTF-8")
    
    return message
}

2)one-way conversion from UTF-8 to Shift_JIS (Worked Well)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body as a byte array (assuming it's in UTF-8)
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    
    // Convert the UTF-8 byte array to a Shift_JIS string
    def shiftJisString = new String(bodyBytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8).getBytes("Shift_JIS")
    
    // Set the converted Shift_JIS byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(shiftJisString)
    
    // Set the output charset to Shift_JIS
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", "Shift_JIS")
    
    return message
}

 

3)two-way conversion between UTF-8 and Shift_JIS (Not Working Well)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Define the source and target encodings here
    def sourceEncoding = "Shift_JIS"  // Change this to your source encoding
    def targetEncoding = "UTF-8"  // Change this to your target encoding
    
    // Get the body as a byte array
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    
    def convertedBytes
    
    // Perform the conversion based on the specified encodings
    if (sourceEncoding == "Shift_JIS" && targetEncoding == "UTF-8") {
        convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, "Shift_JIS").getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)
    } else if (sourceEncoding == "UTF-8" && targetEncoding == "Shift_JIS") {
        convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8).getBytes("Shift_JIS")
    } else {
        // For other encoding combinations, use a more general approach
        convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, sourceEncoding).getBytes(targetEncoding)
    }
    
    // Set the converted byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(convertedBytes)
    
    // Set the output charset
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", targetEncoding)
    
    return message
}

 

To add on, (3)two-way conversion between UTF-8 and Shift_JIS works well when it is SJIS to UTF-8.

However, it does not work when it is UTF-8 to SJIS.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to download HTTP Request Body (API) as an Excel file in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am building an integration flow which calls an Ariba API. In Postman, the API response is as shown in 2nd screenshot below. We then download the response as an .xlsx file, and it will be in a readable Excel file format.

In the Integration Flow, I am writing the API response to a data store, which returns the same thing as what we get on Postman. However, I need to download the response as an Excel file. How do I do that? Can that be configured directly in the HTTP connector step?

entry.title: CPI error "java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException" in Groovy Script
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have encountered the following error in a Groovy script. The error appears in several parts of the code:

com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: 2 at line 82 in script1.groovy.
Code:
String test_type = TERST_PNR.substring(1, 2);
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: -2 at line 171 in script1.groovy.
Code:
if (xmlstr.substring(getXMLTag_startindex2 - 2, getXMLTag_startindex2 - 1).equals("/"))
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: -145 at line 195 in script1.groovy.
Code:
String tagtext = xmlstr.substring(getXMLTag_startindex2, getXMLTag_endindex1);
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occurred: java.lang.StringIndexOutOfBoundsException: String index out of range: 3 at line 144 in script1.groovy.
Code:
"  <p1:SYSID>" + SNDPRN.substring(0, 3) + "</p1:SYSID>\r\n"

In each code section, the "substring" method is used. The error does not always occur. Three percent of all messages encounter this error.

Strangely enough, when I restart the messages in the ERP system, they are transmitted without errors. I have no chance to trace the message and reproduce the error

Has anyone experiences with this error? How can it be resolved? Is there a way to log the payload without enabling the trace?

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Username Change in Incoming IDOC
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts ,

For incoming IDOC from CPI , the username is not  getting changed from custom user name  (R_xxxx) to WF-BATCH at status 62 (IDOC passed to application) with the processing program SAPLBD20 . Due to that  custom user ID ( System User type ),  Authorization is failing to create the document . This is happening all of sudden.

Expectation is that it should have WF-BATCH as user .

I have checked all the possibilities but couldn't find what could be the cause of this issue . Please let me know if this can be  due to any enhancement or IDOC configuration for that Partner profile/ message type.

entry.title: What is the point of Script Collection Deployment in Cloud Integration?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

According to SAP Help Portal , when using scripts, here is the workflow/procedure.

As you can see, it says that "Consuming a Script Collection" comes before "Deploying a Script Collection".

However, I am so confused that if we can consume a script collection even without deploying the script collection beforehands, then what is the point of deploying it??

I have also asked this question in this SAP blog that is created by a SAP Expert, but I still have not got the reply.

 

Please kindly help to answer this one.

Thank you in advance!

 

 

he two resources, when creating script collections, we can consume them first then deploy them. 

Resource 1) SAP Help Portal

Resource 2) SAP Blog

entry.title: SFTP Sender : Unable to poll the files in SAP CI
entry.content:
Hi SAP people,

We have a SFTP vendor and are having Inbound and Outbound file transfers scenarios.

  • Mode of Authentication: Public Key
  • In Inbound file transfer, we performed Connectivity Test in CPI and are able to see the files available in their SFTP.
  • The filename to be polled is Test_310.pdf.pgp
  • The filename in SFTP adapter is set as *.pgp to fetch files only with .pgp extension.

But file is not getting picked up by CPI.

Other things to be noted,

  1. In Manage Intergration Content, the job is appearing Deployed and last successful run is also updating.
  2. There is no message lock on file in CPI.
  3. We have maintained the known.hosts file also.

We also observed that since job is active and running at interval of 5 minutes every day. It transfers file somewhere in 3-4 days, all of sudden. We're unable to understand where the issue is, since SFTP vendor confirmed us, they have made no changes, and for us we are able to process inbound/outbound files with other SFTP vendors.

entry.title: How to add dynamic query parameter from header in HTTP GET call in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi experts

I am trying to add a dynamic query to an HTTP GET call URL.

My URL is like https://example.com?$top=2&$select=CustomerID, here the value of top needs to change according to the value passed in header. I have allowed the header in the runtime configuration. I am the adding this value to exchange property in the content modifier before putting the whole query in the query parameters ( I will attach images if this is not clear, sorry, English is not my first language) . However, the call is being made to a URL containing garbage value and I am not sure what is going wrong. I will appreciate any help.

entry.title: SOAPification of external RESTful APIs using Integration Suite for SOAMANAGER
entry.content:
Hello,
How are you dealing with SOAPification of RESTful services in SAP Integration Suite mediated integration scenarios? The backend is S4 and we want to make use of the SOAP monitoring framework and hence want to implement external RESTful services as SOAP APIs with in S4/HANA.

Is there any better method to generate ABAP proxy classes for the service consumption from the RESTful SWAGGER definition? Or the only way is to create POSTMan collection, generate JSONs, convert them to XMLs and then generate XSDs from them and finally create WSDLs manually?

Any thoughts are inputs appreciated.

#RESTfulservices #REST #SOAP #SOAPIFICATION #SOAMANAGER #SWAGGER #SAPIntegrationSuite #CPI #SAPIS #CI #CloudIntegration #BTP

entry.title: SHA-512 error in CPI but works in groovyide
entry.content:
Hi All,

The below code works fine in groovy ide and i am trying to convert a string to SHA-512 encoded string.

Error received in SAP CPI is 

No signature of method: java.lang.String.digest() is applicable for argument types: (java.lang.String) values: [SHA-512]
Possible solutions: getAt(java.lang.String), next(), toSet(), size(), size(), toList()

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message; 
import java.util.HashMap; 
import java.security.MessageDigest; 
import java.security.*
import java.text.DateFormat; 
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat; 
import java.util.Date; 
import java.time.*
def Message processData(Message message) {
    def props = message.getProperties();
    def origDate = props.get("date")
    Date oldDate = Date.parse('yyyy-MM-ddHH:mm:ss', origDate);
    long datetimestampUnix = oldDate.getTime();
    datetimestampUnix = datetimestampUnix/1000
 message.setHeader("iat", datetimestampUnix)
 def body = datetimestampUnix+"ClientID"+"Password"+"ClientSecret"+"username"
 message.setHeader("Hash", body)
 body = body.get
      def sha512 = body.digest('SHA-512')
     message.setHeader("SHA-512", sha512)
	return message;
}

entry.title: Information about who/when was an integration artefact undeployed
entry.content:
Hello community,

does someone of you know how to get the information about
- who undeployed a specific integration artefact
- when has an integration artefact been undeployed?

I would assume this information will be stored in some log file because of security and consistency reasons.
I already checked the system logs (http log and trace log) and the APIs for Cloud Integration. So far I couldn't find a place to get this information.

Would appreciate any idea where I could do have a look into.

entry.title: How to Gather Error Logs in sap CPI.
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I have a requirment, Once i get the data into CPI, i split the each record and will post to two APIs in paralell, My req here when ever there is an error i need to send an email of all errors with source data, each record i send an email, but how to merger all these records into, Since im using router, i cant able to use gather option and even gather is not working in exception subprocess, Can anyone help on this requirment.

 

Thank You!

#cpi#sapcpi#gather#ErrorHandling

entry.title: How to configure CPI to access diferent Successfactors environments?
entry.content:
We have a single CPI environment and two different Successfactors environments.
How can we configure CPI to access the desired Successfactors environment, to read data from a specific environment, without having to republish the integration flow every time the externalized configuration values ​​change?
Is this possible?

Thanks.

entry.title: Attachment handling in CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can someone suggest us how to handle attachment in CPI while posting the data into rest API(HTTP service).

Scenario: we used to receive the data from Amazon S3 bucket in the form of XML and in between there would be some logics so after completion of logics we have to post the data as an attachment. Can anyone suggest how to achive this requirement in CPI.

Thank you!

entry.title: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am wondering if I want to specify to which decimal place I would like to round for a certain value in SAP Cloud Integration, is there any standard function I can use?

Right now I am aware that I can use "Message Mapping" - "Round Function".

However, with this function, I can not round the results to one decimal place by rounding the second decimal place. 

If I want to, for example, round "18.2252" to "18.23", is there any standard function in message mapping I can use? (Maybe FormatNumber?But I do not know how to use it)

Or the only way would be UDF?

 

Thanks
